ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder to save split notes in. If empty, the folder of the original note will be used.
ast.target: 保存分割笔记的文件夹。如果为空，将使用原始笔记所在的文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The sequence of characters to split by.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the delimiter will not be included in the content of split notes.
ast.target: 如果启用，分隔符将不会包含在分割笔记的内容中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the first line of split content will be used as the title of the split note. If disabled, a timestamp will be used. e.g. note-splitter-1702591910
ast.target: 如果启用，分割内容的第一行将用作分割笔记的标题。如果禁用，将使用时间戳。例如：note-splitter-1702591910

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text to append to the split content.
ast.target: 要附加到分割内容的文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delete the original note after a successful split.
ast.target: 成功分割后删除原始笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 请打开一个 Markdown 笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No file found for this note.
ast.target: 未找到此笔记对应的文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please switch to editing mode to split this note.
ast.target: 请切换到编辑模式以分割此笔记。
